title: DevWorld <-> Mirofish adapter scope
decision: Mirofish stays adapter-only: DevWorld maps external simulator plugins through a bounded adapter surface and never embeds a full Mirofish runtime in v0.
unblock_condition: A future RFC plus owner sign-off that specifies a bounded Mirofish runtime integration and its resource envelope.
deferral_rollback_rule: Any Mirofish-dependent task reverts to the adapter-only surface; no runtime is introduced without the unblock RFC.
